task_desc: Fix movement system bugs and upgrade rendering pipeline -- (1) fix the radians/degrees angle wrapping bug in update() at main.js:1014 where facingDir-targetDir difference is compared against 180 (degrees) but both values are radians, causing the fly to spin the long way around on direction changes (should use Math.PI), (2) eliminate the setTimeout flood in update() at main.js:1066-1070 where 60fps creates ~120 pending timeouts all resetting the same 3 legacy flags -- replace with a frame-counted timer or tick counter, (3) switch the render loop at main.js:1120 from setInterval(fn, 1e3/60) to requestAnimationFrame with delta-time-based updates for smooth animation and proper tab-backgrounding, (4) add high-DPI canvas support using devicePixelRatio so the fly is crisp on Retina displays, (5) clamp fly movement bounds to the visible canvas area (top: 44px toolbar, bottom: 90px panel) so the fly cannot walk behind UI chrome, (6) remove dead legacy worm-sim flags (stimulateHungerNeurons, stimulateNoseTouchNeurons, stimulateFoodSenseNeurons) from connectome.js and main.js, replacing the wall-collision touch stimulus at main.js:1033-1044 with direct BRAIN.stimulate.touch = true calls. Files: js/main.js, js/connectome.js.
